description: A clerk needs to find the status of an LTL shipment using the carrier's progressive (PRO) number.

nodes.task_description: Enter the carrier's PRO number into the tracking system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly inputs the PRO number.

nodes.task_description: The system identifies the carrier associated with the PRO number format.

expected_outcome.value: The system correctly determines the PRO number belongs to 'XPO Logistics'.

nodes.task_description: Query the identified carrier's API for tracking information using the PRO number.

expected_outcome.value: The system retrieves the latest tracking status, 'In Transit to Destination Terminal'.
